title: lithocarpus mekongensis
intro: Lithocarpus mekongensis, also known as the Mekong cork oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lithocarpus mekongensis include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Lithocarpus mekongensis is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal use, with the bark and leaves being the most commonly used parts of the plant for medicinal purposes.
